xcode.description: Primary Xcode MCP — build, test, archive, simulator management, LLDB, SPM (59 tools). Use before writing any xcodebuild command.

ios-simulator.description: iOS Simulator interaction — UI accessibility tree, tap/swipe/type, screenshots. Use before interacting with the simulator.

spm.description: Swift Package Manager — add, update, resolve, clean packages without raw `swift package` commands.
